d:
Talene flies to a designated tile in the [[center of the battlefield]], consumes [[12.5%]] of her max HP and [[250]] Energy per second to shoot a [[5]]-tile flame, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and extra damage equal to [[170%]] of her lost HP to enemies within range. The extra damage is shared among all hit enemies.
Talene can cast this skill even when she is out of Energy, but the HP consumed per second will increase to [[20%]]. This skill ends when there are no enemies within range.
Increases damage dealt per second to [[160%]]<ATK> and extra damage to [[190%]] of her lost HP.
Increases damage dealt per second to [[170%]]<ATK> and extra damage to [[210%]] of her lost HP.
Increases damage dealt per second to [[180%]]<ATK> and extra damage to [[230%]] of her lost HP.
Increases damage dealt per second to [[190%]]<ATK> and extra damage to [[250%]] of her lost HP.

Passive. Whenever Talene loses [[10%]] of her max HP, she will release a warm current that restores [[40%]]<ATK> HP for the [[weakest]] allied hero. Whenever she restores [[10%]] of her max HP, she will unleash a torrent that deals [[50%]]<ATK> damage to the [[healthiest]] enemy.
Active. Talene consumes [[20%]] of her max HP to summon Divine Fire in the area with the most enemies, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage that comes with an extra [[40]] Life Drain to adjacent enemies.
Increases damage dealt to [[215%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Talene transforms into a ball of flame whenever she is defeated. During this state, she cannot be attacked as she is not considered alive, and she can restore [[8%]] of her max HP per second as well as benefit from allies' skills. When her HP reaches above [[65%]], she will resurrect and bring about an explosion, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within [[2]] tiles and knocking them [[1]] tile back. After each resurrection, her Vitality during the flame state will be reduced permanently by [[33]].
After each resurrection, Talene's Vitality will be reduced by [[32]].
After each resurrection, Talene's Vitality will be reduced by [[31]].
After each resurrection, Talene's Vitality will be reduced by [[30]].
Talene increases her ATK by [[8%]] for up to [[32%]] whenever she has consumed [[50%]] of her max HP.
Talene increases her ATK by [[9%]] for up to [[36%]] whenever she has consumed [[50%]] of her max HP.
Talene increases her ATK by [[10%]] for up to [[40%]] whenever she has consumed [[50%]] of her max HP.

Talene grants Pyre of Renewal to the [[frontmost]] allied hero other than herself from the beginning of the battle until the end. Pyre of Renewal carrier will deal damage equal to [[50%]] of their ATK per second to adjacent enemies and restore HP equal to [[25%]] of their damage dealt. Every time the carrier is healed by an amount equal to [[500%]] of their ATK, a kindling will be generated next to them to permanently enhance Talene's Pyre of Renewal, increasing its damage dealt by [[50%]] for up to [[3]] stacks.
Increases Pyre of Renewal carrier's damage dealt to adjacent enemies to [[55%]] of their ATK, and HP recovery to [[30%]] of their damage dealt.
Increases Pyre of Renewal carrier's damage dealt to adjacent enemies to [[60%]] of their ATK, and HP recovery to [[35%]] of their damage dealt.

When Pyre of Renewal reaches the maximum number of stacks and its carrier is defeated, all stacks will be consumed to transform the carrier into a ball of flame. The carrier will then resurrect in [[3]]s with [[50%]] of their max HP. This effect can only be triggered once in each battle.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Vitality, 10 Healing.

d: Talene increases her HP recovered per second to [[15%]] while in the flame state when defeated for the first time in a battle.
